flavourText: A skeletal titan held together by tendons and powered by antagonistic muscle pairs. Name every bone and joint to bring it crumbling down!
This mechanical menace pivots, rotates and flexes through every plane of movement. Find its fulcrum and tip the balance in your favour!
A relentless taskmaster who never skips a session. Apply the principles of training and push past its progressive resistance!
This psychological predator feeds on anxiety and disrupts your arousal levels. Stay in the zone, visualise victory and shut it down!
A three-headed beast of money, media and sponsorship that controls who plays and who pays. Expose its influence to break the cycle!
A lethargic creature that thrives on inactivity and junk food. Get it moving and show it what well-being really means!
A number-crunching fiend that hides behind misleading graphs and dodgy averages. Analyse its weak spots and call out the trends!
A force of nature that launches projectiles and ignores friction. Apply all three laws to stop it in its tracks!
Fuelled by carbohydrates, armoured in protein and insulated with fat. Starve it of the wrong nutrients and watch it collapse!
A sporting mastermind with skills, strategies and an answer for every situation. Outplay, outthink and outperform to claim victory!
